ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "executable" TEXT /* The command to execute without any command line arguments */,
  "dir" TEXT /* The directory the command is to be executed in */,
  "output" TEXT /* Where to direct stdout */,
  "error" TEXT /* Where to direct stderr */,
  "os" TEXT /* Only execute if the system contains specified text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the job was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the job */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* The priority level of the job */,
  "timeout" INTEGER /* The maximum time the job can run before being terminated */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the job can be retried in case of failure */,
  "last_execution_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the last job history entry for this job */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the job should be executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job schedule */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that is scheduled */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "schedule_value" TEXT /* Value of the schedule (e.g., 08:00, Monday, 1st day of the month) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the job schedule should start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the job schedule should end */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_schedules_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* The architecture of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job dependency */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that depends on another job */,
  "dependent_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that is depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* The type of dependency (e.g., sequential, parallel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_dependencies_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_dependencies_dependent_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job parameter */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that has the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The data type of the parameter */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the parameter is required for the job execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_parameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job notification */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that has the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* The channel through which the notification should be sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* The date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_notifications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that has the audit log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the audit log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
